name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Clearwater, FL's Cash America Pawn at 1530 S Missouri Ave offers quick loans on jewelry, electronics, and valuables with convenient Mon-Sat 9AM-6PM hours.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is located at 1530 S Missouri Ave in Clearwater, FL, serving the central Clearwater area with straightforward access from nearby neighborhoods. The store operates Mon-Sat 9AM-6PM and Sun 12-5PM, making it accessible for both weekday errands and weekend transactions. This full-service pawn location accepts loans on jewelry, electronics, designer items, collectibles, and other valuables.

At the Clearwater location, customers receive immediate cash offers based on item appraisal or can browse pre-owned inventory including jewelry, electronics, and sporting goods. Call 727-443-2263 to get a quick estimate before visiting. This Clearwater pawn shop completes transactions the same day, without lengthy approval processes or hidden fees.

Clearwater residents needing emergency cash should bring a valid ID and the items you'd like to pawn or sell. The store closes at 6PM weekdays and 5PM Sunday, so plan accordingly for your visit. Cash America Pawn at this Clearwater, FL location provides fair valuations and fast payouts.
pros: Massive geographic footprint with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America for convenient access
Fast non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property—no credit check required
Buys and sells diverse merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Specialized gold and precious metal buying service for immediate cash
Convenient layaway service with only 10% down payment required
Publicly traded company (S&P 500 MidCap, Russell 2000) providing corporate stability and regulatory oversight
Online store locator and inventory browsing for transparency and convenience
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering personal property as collateral—items are lost if loan not repaid
Interest rates and fees not disclosed on website, making true cost of borrowing opaque
Non-recourse loans mean borrowers cannot reclaim pledged items if unable to repay, potentially at significant loss relative to item value
Primarily serves credit-constrained consumers, suggesting higher costs than traditional lending alternatives
Layaway service requires upfront 10% down payment and involves waiting period to take possession
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable personal property they can temporarily pledge
People without access to traditional credit (low credit score, no credit history, recent bankruptcy)
Individuals seeking quick liquidity without credit checks or income verification
Buyers looking for discounted merchandise through retail pawn shop inventory
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash and own valuable personal property they can temporarily pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical items, meaning default results in permanent loss of those possessions—making this suitable only for customers who can afford to lose the pledged items or are confident in their repayment ability.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Retail sales of pawned and second-hand merchandise
Gold and precious metal buying and valuation
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions (through AFF subsidiary)
Online store locator and branch finder
Cash-on-the-spot purchasing for items of value
Multi-location merchant network with 15,000+ retail partners (through AFF)
meta_description: Clearwater, FL: Cash America Pawn at 1530 S Missouri Ave. Fast pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, and valuables.
